chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 467 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 12.02.2026 Mr. Yousif Khalid Anwar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- Mr. Zeeshan Ahmed, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.3, whilst Mr. Tahir Khalil, Advocate files Vakalatnama of Mr. Asim Iqbal, Advocate on behalf of Respondent No.2, which are taken on record. Learned counsel submits that the Petitioner operates a Captive Power Plan using natural gas and is aggrieved by the Bills issued for the Month of May and August 2025, retrospectively applying the impugned Notifications dated 07.03.2025 and 23.07.2025, which were also the subject of the adjudication in C.P No. D- 1783/2025 and connected cases. He invites attention to the certified copy of the Order dated 12.01.2026 made by a learned Division Bench of this Court in those Petitions so as to point out that the bills issued by the SSGC for collecting the levy retrospectively were held to be ultra vires Sections 3 & 4 of the Grid (Captive Power Plants) Levy Ordinance, 2025 and SSGCL was directed to credit any collection made on that score in the next bill. He submits that this petition ought to be disposed of similarly. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Respondents do not oppose that submission. Under such circumstances, by consent, the Petition stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned Order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the case of the Petitioner.

Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Respondents do not oppose that submission. Under such circumstances, by consent, the Petition stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned Order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the case of the Petitioner. Judge Judge Ayaz
